message:
test(core): property-based tests for consistent hash ring invariants (wa-u6ot)

22 proptest properties covering HashRing: consistency (same key → same node),
vnode count correctness, empty/single-node behavior, duplicate add no-op,
remove correctness, get_nodes distinctness, get_node_pair structure, minimal
remapping on add/remove, distribution balance, stats consistency, with_nodes
equivalence, add/remove cycles, iterator completeness, and clone independence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
